label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out which book Dave ends up with at the end of the semester. So there are five friends: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a specific book. Let me list out who has what initially: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: Ulysses - Claire: The Fellowship of the Ring - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Now, there are a series of swaps. Let me go through each swap step by step and track who has which book after each one. The first swap is between Claire and Bob. So Claire gives her book to Bob, and Bob gives his to Claire. Let's update their books: - Claire now has Ulysses (Bob's original book) - Bob now has The Fellowship of the Ring (Claire's original book) So after first swap: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: The Fellowship of the Ring - Claire: Ulysses - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Second swap is Claire and Dave swapping books. Claire has Ulysses and Dave has Lolita. After swapping: - Claire gives Ulysses to Dave and gets Lolita. - Dave gives Lolita to Claire and gets Ulysses. So after second swap: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: The Fellowship of the Ring - Claire: Lolita - Dave: Ulysses - Eve: Catch-22 Third swap is Dave and Alice swapping books. Dave has Ulysses, Alice has Moby Dick. After swapping: - Dave gives Ulysses to Alice and gets Moby Dick. - Alice gives Moby Dick to Dave
